allow: PowerShell(docker exec blog_app php artisan tinker --execute="echo implode\(',', \\App\\Models\\User::pluck\('email'\)->toArray\(\)\);" 2>&1)

PowerShell(docker exec blog_app php -r "require '/var/www/vendor/autoload.php'; \\$app = require '/var/www/bootstrap/app.php'; \\$app->make\('Illuminate\\Contracts\\Console\\Kernel'\)->bootstrap\(\); \\$u = \\App\\Models\\User::where\('email','author@myblog.com'\)->first\(\); \\$u->syncRoles\(['author']\); echo \\$u->getRoleNames\(\)->implode\(','\);" 2>&1)
PowerShell(docker exec blog_app php artisan storage:link 2>&1)
